title: Manufacturing Engineer - Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates:
Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Royal Enfield Asia Pacific Associates!
